prompt: Minimalist app icon 1024x1024. Pure black background. A white ensō (zen circle) drawn as a single organic brushstroke, but the opening/gap is positioned so the overall shape clearly reads as the letter C. The brushstroke is thick, confident, painted in one gesture — like Japanese calligraphy. The gap in the circle faces right, forming a natural C shape. White on black. Nothing else. No text. Hand-painted feeling, organic ink brush texture. The stroke varies in thickness naturally. Centered with generous negative space around it.
